# alertTitle

**Instance Property**

The title to display in the secure passphrase alert panel.

## Declaration

```swift
var alertTitle: Unmanaged<CFString>
```

## Discussion

When importing or exporting a key, if you set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyImportExportFlags/securePassphrase] flag bit, you can optionally use this field to specify a string for the password panel’s title bar.
title: alertTitle
